top3.sql:
SELECT z.city, z.state
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE maj.department = 'Electrical and Computer Engineering';

SELECT z.city, z.state
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE maj.department = 'Electrical and Computer Engineering';

SELECT z.city, z.state
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE LOWER(maj.department) = 'electrical and computer engineering';

SELECT DISTINCT z.city, z.state
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE maj.department LIKE 'Electrical and Computer Engineering';

SELECT z.city, z.state
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE maj.department = 'Electrical and Computer Engineering';

SELECT z.city, z.state
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE LOWER(maj.department) = 'electrical and computer engineering';

SELECT DISTINCT z.city, z.state
FROM member m
JOIN major maj ON m.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN zip_code z ON m.zip = z.zip_code
WHERE maj.department LIKE 'Electrical and Computer Engineering';
